synopsis:
Issue 3 of 6 of the Marvel Comics Obi-Wan Kenobi adaptation miniseries. This issue is an adaptation of the third episode of the television series Obi-Wan Kenobi.
ESCAPE FROM PLANET MAPUZO!
As OBI-WAN searches for allies to help him evade THE EMPIRE…he must face his greatest failure: DARTH VADER!
title: Obi-Wan Kenobi #3
